sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (time DateTime, number UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY time;
SELECT sequenceMatch('(?1)(?2)(?t>1)')(time, number = 1, number = 2) FROM events;
UPDATE events SET number = 3 WHERE number = 2;
SELECT sequenceMatch('(?1).*?(?2)')(time, number = 1, number = 3) FROM events;
